name: Speedy Crabmeat Imperial
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a 1 1/2 quart casserole.
2. Microwave on high, uncovered, for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in pimento and next five ingredients, stirring until smooth.
4. Gradually add milk and Chablis, stirring well.
5. Microwave at High, uncovered, for 3-4 minutes or until bubbly, stirring after 2 minutes.
6. Stir in crabmeat. Spoon mixture evenly into 6 baking shells.
7. Arrange shells on a 12-inch glass pizza plate.
8. Cover with waxed paper, and microwave on high for 3-4 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
9. Garnish, if desired, with pimento strips.
